commit.message:
fix(report-to-lark+ci): fix card elapsed time and missing stages in failure/success jobs

The --card-finish command runs in a separate job with no state file, so it fell
back to a minimal one-item state with startedAt=now, producing "0s elapsed" and
losing all stage names.

Fix: --card-create now outputs card_started_at/card_stages/card_title to
GITHUB_OUTPUT. fetch-docs-auto.yml passes these as job outputs to the
failure/success jobs, which forward them to --card-finish via --started-at,
--stages, and --title. The fallback reconstruction now shows the full stage list
and the correct elapsed time.

commit.message:
Replace Leaflet map with @mirawision/usa-map-react for better UX

- Install @mirawision/usa-map-react (MIT licensed, React-optimized)
- Create usa-map-component.tsx with interactive state-based visualization
- Color-coded states: gray (0) → light blue (1-5) → dark blue (51+)
- Each state is clickable and navigates to /{state-slug}
- Built-in tooltips show provider counts on hover
- State labels (abbreviations) rendered on map
- Responsive SVG map with built-in Tailwind integration
- Remove old Leaflet-based locations-map-client.tsx

Features:
- Per-state click handlers for navigation
- Density-based color mapping from live Supabase data
- Clean interactive legend matching old statebins design
- Uses library's native State configuration API

commit.message:
Add graceful shutdown, fix vendor/trainer sound replay, add asset ETag caching

- Server: JVM shutdown hook calls server.stop() with grace period; ApplicationStopped listener saves all player states and closes ZipFile bundle

- Client: Only play vendor/trainer interactSound when panel first opens, not on refresh after buy/sell/stat changes

- Server: Asset endpoint now sends ETag + Cache-Control: no-cache so Coil revalidates and picks up updated sprites without manual cache clearing

commit.message:
test(translator): redirect output to tmp dir in tests to keep output/ clean

Tests were writing real JSON files to output/ because writeTranslationOutput
was called without isolation. Fix by reading OUTPUT_BASE_DIR env var in
handler.ts and setting it to mkdtemp in both handler.test.ts and
router.test.ts.

Note: Bun shares module registry across test files, so mock.module('./handler')
at top-level in router.test.ts leaked into handler.test.ts. The OUTPUT_BASE_DIR
approach avoids module mocking entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix paid-but-not-finalized badge; scope admin-paid to single dancer

backend/main.py:
- Migration: back-fill is_finalized=TRUE for any existing registration
  where payment_status is 'paid', 'free', or 'admin-paid' but
  is_finalized was left as FALSE (fixes "Paid but not Finalized" in
  the admin portal)
- admin_finalize_registration: accept optional ?student_id / ?observer_id
  query params. When the registration is already finalized and a specific
  dancer ID is supplied, only that dancer is removed from
  pending_student_ids and a targeted transaction is recorded — leaving
  all other pending dancers open for normal user-portal payment.
  The whole-reg finalize path (no ID supplied, or non-finalized reg) is
  unchanged.

admin.html:
- pendingRegs filter: also exclude registrations whose payment_status is
  'paid'/'free'/'admin-paid', guarding against any remaining legacy rows
  where is_finalized may still be false
- maybeAdminFinalize: accept { studentId, observerId } options and
  forward them as query params to the admin-finalize endpoint
- adminAddRegStudent / adminAddRegObserver: pass the specific dancer ID
  so only that dancer is admin-paid instead of the entire registration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: wire --image flag for direct E01/raw disk image processing

Add --image/-i CLI flag that opens E01 or raw disk images directly,
extracts all four NTFS artifacts ($MFT, $MFTMirr, $LogFile, $UsnJrnl:$J),
and feeds them through the full analysis pipeline automatically.

- --image conflicts with --journal/--mft/--mftmirr/--logfile (one mode or the other)
- --output-dir controls where extracted artifacts are saved (defaults to temp dir)
- Without the 'image' feature, --image gives a clear error with rebuild instructions
- Move tempfile from dev-dependency to regular dependency
- Update README with E01 usage examples, architecture diagram, and feature comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Reorganize settings by user priority and fix update relaunch

Settings reordered from technical categories to user intent:
- Quick Settings: dark mode, pill, start with Windows, auto-paste, sound, hotkey
- Provider & API Keys: provider selection and key cards
- Language & Output: text output and language settings
- Advanced (collapsible): local models, visualizer, always on top, retention, runtime
- Updates: channel, auto-download, status
- Planned Features, Danger Zone

Also fixes:
- Update relaunch: stop sidecar before installer runs to prevent
  lingering child processes from blocking NSIS silent relaunch
- Hardcoded v1.2.0 in footer replaced with dynamic "Loading..."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Add USER_PREDEFINED.md for predefined agents with token count sidebar

Add shared agent-level USER_PREDEFINED.md file for predefined agents to define
baseline user-handling rules (owner info, audience, language, communication norms)
that apply to ALL users. Individual USER.md per-user supplements but never overrides.

- Seed USER_PREDEFINED.md template in SeedToStore for new predefined agents
- Backfill existing agents via ensureUserPredefined in summon/regenerate flows
- AI optionally generates/updates the file when description mentions people/user context
- Add to context file interceptor, RPC allowlist, and system prompt injection
- Update summoning modal with optional file progress tracking
- Show estimated token count (Unicode-aware) instead of bytes in file sidebar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: include goal UUID in reflection prompt — LLM was hallucinating goal IDs

The reflection prompt showed goal descriptions but never the actual UUID,
causing the LLM to output made-up goal_ids like "create_sentiment_endpoint"
instead of the real UUID. Goals were never properly completed.

commit.message:
Inline CSS/JS into board HTML before encryption

External stylesheets failed to load after StatiCrypt decryption.
Fixed by inlining CSS and JS directly into each HTML file before
encrypting, making each page fully self-contained. Removed the
now-unnecessary board/shared/ directory.

feat: implement investor-startup matchmaking system with anonymization

Add complete matchmaking system connecting investors with startups:

Backend:
- Connection model with mutual acceptance workflow
- Matching algorithm scoring on sector, stage, and check size (0-100 scale)
- Discovery API with filtering (industry, stage, location)
- Anonymization logic hiding contact info until mutual acceptance
- 5 new API endpoints: /api/discover, /api/connections (CRUD), /api/matches

Frontend:
- InvestorDashboard showing recommended matches and connections
- StartupDashboard with accept/decline functionality for connection requests
- Contact info reveal only after both parties accept
- Real-time UI updates with React Query mutations

Features:
- Only approved, actively fundraising startups shown to investors
- Prevents off-platform communication via anonymization
- Mutual acceptance required before contact exchange
- Performance indexes for fast queries
- Duplicate prevention with unique constraints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Allow admins to create user documents

Updated Firestore rules to permit admin users to create user documents for coaches

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add calendar task scheduling — create, view, cancel from calendar

- scheduled_tasks DB table with agent_id, title, notes, scheduled_for, status
- POST /api/schedule — create a task on a specific date for a specific agent
- DELETE /api/schedule/{id} — cancel a scheduled task
- /api/calendar now includes scheduled tasks in response
- Calendar UI: '+' button appears on hover over any future day cell
- Schedule modal: agent dropdown, title, notes — saves to calendar immediately
- Day detail modal: shows scheduled tasks with amber dashed style + Cancel button
- Daily 6 AM job in scheduler fires any tasks scheduled for today

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 加入影片背景 — 電腦版/手機版自動切換
